topic: Perform a ruthless technical IP and market audit for: 'AI-Powered Oceanic Compute Hubs (AOCH): Capitalizing on the trend of integrating data centers with renewable energy sources like offshore wind turbines, AOCH will establish AI-optimized compute clusters within these offshore energy platforms. This concept tackles the immense power and space demands of AI, offering a sustainable, off-grid solution that utilizes natural ocean cooling and co-located renewable energy, thereby addressing the growing enterprise need for scalable and environmentally responsible AI infrastructure.'. Extract exact TAM/SAM sizes, fundings for top 5 competitors. For the IP landscape, you MUST explicitly search patents.google.com and worldwide.espacenet.com to extract 3-5 specific patent family numbers related to this technology. INTERROGATOR DIRECTIVE: Investigate the current LCOE (Levelized Cost of Energy) floor price for offshore wind projects in regions with high AI compute demand potential. Identify specific patent numbers or patent applications related to subsea data transmission cables that are designed to withstand extreme marine conditions and have a projected deployment timeline before 2028. Research any recent (post-2022) regulatory delta changes in major maritime nations regarding the permitting and operational standards for offshore industrial facilities that are not solely energy generation, and find the specific date of the most recent significant regulatory update impacting offshore infrastructure.
